hero.title: Modernize. Optimize.
hero.subtitle: We support public institutions and organizations in their digital transformation with innovative solutions tailored to the challenges of modern administrations.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: With our deep industry expertise, we help Public Administrations evaluate their processes, define strategies for digital growth, and optimize operations. From assessment to delivery, we guide every step to ensure actionable strategies and clear milestones.

items.title: Strategy & Planning
items.description: We strengthen institutions through tailored training and knowledge transfer — building capabilities that sustain change and improve public service delivery
items.detailedDescription: We help institutions develop comprehensive digital transformation strategies that align with their mission and objectives. Our approach combines organizational assessment, stakeholder engagement, and roadmap development to ensure successful implementation.

items.title: Sourcing & Implementation Support
items.description: We help you translate your vision into precise sourcing requirements and guide your projects through successful execution, with hands-on support every step of the way.
items.detailedDescription: We accompany you in translating your vision into precise sourcing requirements and guide your projects through successful execution, with hands-on support at every stage.

items.title: Capacity Development
items.description: We strengthen institutions through tailored training and knowledge transfer — building capabilities that sustain change and improve public service delivery
items.detailedDescription: We build lasting organizational capabilities through comprehensive training programs, knowledge transfer initiatives, and institutional strengthening activities. Our goal is to ensure your team can independently manage and evolve your digital systems.

products.title: Ready-to-Deploy Solutions
products.subtitle: Innovative digital platforms designed to meet the specific needs of modern administrations

items.name: CONNECT
items.description: Modern e-Portal offering seamless access to regulatory info and connecting traders with Customs.

items.name: DETECT
items.description: AI-driven risk management system for targeting high-risk shipments, fraudulent taxpayers, and risky passengers.

items.name: TRADEVAL
items.description: Intuitive system with advanced analytics for accurate shipment classification and valuation. It sets up a National Prices Database.

items.name: REPORTER
items.description: Mobile application for digitizing trade inspections and improving fraud data collection.

items.name: ANALYTICA
items.description: Predictive BI platform providing full operational visibility and smart decisions support.

items.name: Weighing in Motion System
items.description: Modern road safety system for real-time monitoring of truck weights and dimensions.

items.name: Driver License & Vehicle Registration
items.description: Secure platform for end-to-end management of driver licenses and vehicle registration.

items.name: SAFEROAD
items.description: Integrated platform for road traffic and real-time safety monitoring.

clients.title: They Trust Us
clients.subtitle: Public institutions and organizations that trust us for their digital transformation

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: We collaborate with world-renowned partners to deliver the best solutions

about.title: Your Partner for Institutional Transformation
about.description1: Automa Tech  is a company specializing in digital transformation of public institutions and administrations. We leverage innovation and digital transformation as pillars of our business model to modernize institutional processes.
about.description2: Our client-centric approach ensures that each solution is designed around your specific needs and value chain. We get involved from the inception of your projects to ensure their relevance and maximize your return on investment.
highlights: Innovation and digital transformation at the core of our expertise
Client-centric approach and early engagement in your projects
Optimized solutions offering the best value for money

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To bridge the technological gap between developing and developed countries by providing government and private entities with the right solutions and support to build their digital future successfully. Our reward: celebrating success with our clients.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Automa Tech , we empower public administrations with innovative, tailored technology solutions that drive digital transformation and sustainable development.

contact.title: Partner with us to scale your digital transformation
contact.subtitle: We're here to answer your questions and help you find the best service(s) to meet your needs.
